entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:25.126955 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\BDCC_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0148.9874] The company has reported the concept us-gaap:OtherComprehensiveIncomeLossForeignCurrencyTransactionAndTranslationAdjustmentNetOfTax as a descendant of Income Losss in the calculation linkbase of the filing. This element is an OCI item and should not be included as a component of Net Income Loss.
Rule Element Id:9874 Rule version: 29.0.2 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/elts/us-gaap-2025.xsd 12418
